figures.caption: Figure 4: (a) Consensus network, according to [41]; (b) Reconstructed signalling network by [41]; (c) Super-DAG obtained by taking the union of (a) and (b), with the edge between PIP3 and PLCg oriented as PIP3 → PLCg. In panels (a) and (b), blue dashed arrows indicate edges on which the two networks disagree.

Figure 3: Empirical power at nominal level 0.05 for testing directed edges under varying signal strength. The top panel varies γ when testing the null of no edge from Y1 to Y3; the bottom panel varies η when testing the null of no edge from Y2 to Y3.

Figure 1: Simulation results on the Chain, Hub, Random, and Sachs structures. Boxplots compare squared MMD between the model-generated samples and 5,000 reference samples from the true interventional distribution across 50 independent repetitions for each training sample size. Lower values indicate better recovery of the target interventional law.
